info.title: MSGNS API v2
info.description: API v2 for the MSGNS application. Provides endpoints for Identity management (authentication, user profile, administration) and Products (product types).

post.summary: Assign a role to a user

delete.summary: Remove a role from a user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users with optional filtering and sorting.
Generates a CSV file with user data matching the provided filters.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Alias for POST /identity/sign-up. Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token.
Logs in a user with email and password, returning an access token.
Logs in or registers a user using a Google ID token.
Sends a verification email to the user.
Verifies a user's email address using a token.
Sends a password reset email to the user.
Resets the user's password using a token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information.

post.description: Initiates an email change process for the authenticated user.
Confirms a pending email change using a token.

delete.description: Cancels a pending email change for the authenticated user.

post.description: Logs out the authenticated user and invalidates the session.
Allows an administrator to impersonate another user. The response includes tokens to switch context.
Stops the current impersonation session and returns to the admin context.
Bulk-generates products from type/quantity pairs. Returns an Excel file by default (one sheet per model). Pass Accept: application/json for a legacy-format JSON response instead.

typeId.description: ID of the ProductType to generate

200.description: Generated products as Excel file (default) or JSON

post.summary: Register product with password and owner

put.summary: Configure product target URL with forward-only status transition

post.summary: Reset a product to virgin state

422.description: Product type cannot be reset (bracelet/fancelet types)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all product types with optional sorting.

post.description: Creates a new product type with the provided data.

code.description: Unique code for the product type

get.description: Returns the details of a specific product type by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a product type. Some fields are protected when the type is in use.

code.description: Unique code (protected if type is in use)

primary_model.description: Primary model (protected if type is in use)

secondary_model.description: Secondary model (protected if type is in use)

422.description: Validation error - field protected or invalid

post.description: Records a usage event for the specified product. Requires a valid user ID, product name, and scan timestamp.

userId.description: ID of the user triggering the usage event

productName.description: Name of the product at time of scan

scannedAt.description: ISO-8601 datetime of the scan event

422.description: Validation error — missing or malformed field; scannedAt must be a strict ISO-8601 datetime with timezone offset

data.description:
Base controller with global OpenAPI metadata.

This abstract class provides shared OpenAPI 3.0 documentation attributes
that apply to all API v2 endpoints. The security scheme is defined here
so that all authenticated endpoints can reference it.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Sanctum access token in the format: Bearer <token>

tags.name: Identity
tags.description: User authentication, profile, and account management
